built.name: Capture/comms agent
built.english: A new cloud service watches your inbox, calendar, Drive, Telegram and WhatsApp. Anything inbound — a new email, a calendar invite, a message — gets read within 60 seconds, classified by urgency and topic, and routed to the right agent (Beatrix, Clem) or filed straight into your brain.
built.setup: Already live. Cloud service is auto-deployed via Render on every push.
built.test: Open https://bridge-intake.onrender.com/dashboard — Section I shows live status.

built.name: Trust + permissions audit
built.english: Every action any agent takes is logged with a timestamp, the target, and the reasoning. You can see the trail of what your agents did and why.
built.setup: Already live. Cloud service is auto-deployed via Render on every push.
built.test: Open https://bridge-intake.onrender.com/dashboard — Section I shows live status.

built.name: Bridget's intake engine
built.english: The membrane between every inbound channel and your inner agents. Classifies (urgent / normal / personal / CRREM / admin), decides whether to act unprompted, queue for later, or escalate to you. Sixty seconds end-to-end.
built.setup: Already live. Cloud service is auto-deployed via Render on every push.
built.test: Open https://bridge-intake.onrender.com/dashboard — Section I shows live status.

built.name: Trust-and-audit substrate
built.english: The bedrock that makes safe delegation possible. Permission tiers per agent. 24-hour undo on reversible actions. Per-agent kill switches. Full data export.
built.setup: Already live. Cloud service is auto-deployed via Render on every push.
built.test: Open https://bridge-intake.onrender.com/dashboard — Section I shows live status.

built.name: Coordinate engine over your vault
built.english: Read 39 of your most signal-rich vault pages, computed your position across the 6 BRIDGE planes (lifestyle, behaviour, intelligence, values, identity, mission). Quoted evidence from your own writing anchors each placement.
built.setup: Already live. Cloud service is auto-deployed via Render on every push.
built.test: Open https://bridge-intake.onrender.com/dashboard — Section I shows live status.

built.name: Per-agent permission tiers
built.english: Each agent has 3 levels of authority per scope: advisory (suggests only), delegated (acts and logs), autonomous (acts then reports). Tunable by category.
built.setup: Already live. Cloud service is auto-deployed via Render on every push.
built.test: Open https://bridge-intake.onrender.com/dashboard — Section I shows live status.

built.name: Weekly audit digest
built.english: Every Sunday at 7pm, Bridget sends a Telegram digest in plain English: what your agents did unprompted, what they did on your behalf, what got stuck, what's waiting on you.
built.setup: Audit digest plist ready. Run: `launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.omar.bridge.audit-digest.plist`
built.test: Wait for Sunday 7pm or trigger: `launchctl start com.omar.bridge.audit-digest`. Telegram message lands.

built.name: 24-hour undo
built.english: Sent message? Created event? Moved file? One command reverses it. Window: 24 hours after the action.
built.setup: Already live. Cloud service is auto-deployed via Render on every push.
built.test: Open https://bridge-intake.onrender.com/dashboard — Section I shows live status.

built.name: Kill switches
built.english: Per-agent and per-capability kill switches. Master switch shuts everything down. Documented in plain English so you can find the right switch fast.
built.setup: Already live. Cloud service is auto-deployed via Render on every push.
built.test: Open https://bridge-intake.onrender.com/dashboard — Section I shows live status.

built.name: Full data export
built.english: One command produces a tar.gz containing your vault, audit log, agent configs, permissions config, kill-switch state, undo handles. Your data is portable. You can leave anytime.
built.setup: Already live. Cloud service is auto-deployed via Render on every push.
built.test: Open https://bridge-intake.onrender.com/dashboard — Section I shows live status.

built.name: Bridget's life-map state
built.english: A continuously-updated model of where you are: location, mood, energy, current week's shape. Other agents query this before responding so they know what's happening in your life.
built.setup: Already running. Bridget identity refreshes from openclaw/workspace-bridget/ files on every cloud redeploy.

built.name: Bridget's reflection cadence
built.english: Daily check-in at 8:30pm, Sunday review at 6pm, monthly retrospective on the first Sunday. Asks the questions you'd ask yourself if you had the discipline.
built.setup: Already running. Bridget identity refreshes from openclaw/workspace-bridget/ files on every cloud redeploy.

built.name: Bridget's emotional barometer
built.english: Reads tone, sleep quality, calendar density, voice signals. When you're frayed, the system softens its tone and prunes the day — silently, without commentary on your state.
built.setup: Already running. Bridget identity refreshes from openclaw/workspace-bridget/ files on every cloud redeploy.

built.name: Bridget's proactive check-ins
built.english: Patterns Bridget notices and surfaces: 'haven't journaled in 9 days, want to?', 'the friend you haven't messaged in 3 months just posted something big.'
built.setup: Already running. Bridget identity refreshes from openclaw/workspace-bridget/ files on every cloud redeploy.

built.name: Finance specialist
built.english: Bank + cards ingested via CSV import (live PSD2 ready). Multi-currency EUR/USD/EGP. Spending categorized. NL tax aware. €950/month debt trajectory tracked. Subscription audit. Monthly review in plain English.
built.setup: Already live as part of Beatrix umbrella in OpenClaw.

built.name: Fitness specialist
built.english: Apple Health pipeline (placeholder until wired). 75kg trajectory tracked. Workouts context-aware: gym when home, 15-min routines while traveling, walking-meeting suggestions when calendar's dense.
built.setup: Already live as part of Beatrix umbrella in OpenClaw.

built.name: Photos specialist
built.english: Every photo arriving on any channel flows into a master chronological archive. Auto-labeled. Receipts route to finance, business cards to people-graph. 'One year ago today' notifications.
built.setup: Already live as part of Beatrix umbrella in OpenClaw.

built.name: People-graph specialist
built.english: Living map of every person in your life. Last interaction, important dates, follow-up cadence. Drafts 'thinking of you' messages in your voice when someone goes quiet. Pre-meeting context surfacer.
built.setup: Already live as part of Beatrix umbrella in OpenClaw.

built.name: Travel logistics specialist
built.english: Visa requirements, vaccinations, time-zone shifts, weather, hotel context (where you stayed last time, what you liked), packing list from past trips, currency notes.
built.setup: Already live as part of Beatrix umbrella in OpenClaw.

built.name: Event-specific agent
built.english: For each major upcoming event (wedding, conference, gathering), Beatrix spawns a dedicated mini-agent. Pulls dress code, gifts based on who they are, RSVP, hotel + flights, dietary asks, post-event follow-ups.
built.setup: Already live as part of Beatrix umbrella in OpenClaw.

built.name: Decision support
built.english: When you're facing a real decision, Beatrix pulls relevant prior decisions from the brain, frames the questions you should answer first, presents the case for and against.
built.setup: Already live as part of Beatrix umbrella in OpenClaw.

built.name: State / wellbeing
built.english: Reads tone from messages, sleep from Apple Health, calendar density, voice energy. Notices burnout drift. System calibrates to your state without narrating it back to you.
built.setup: Already live as part of Beatrix umbrella in OpenClaw.

built.name: Opportunity watcher
built.english: Surfaces things you'd want and might miss: jobs in your orbit, speaking invitations, grants/funding for CRREM, residencies, fellowships, conferences.
built.setup: Already live as part of Beatrix umbrella in OpenClaw.

built.name: Reputation agent
built.english: Tracks how you show up publicly. LinkedIn, X/Twitter, articles, talks. Notices inconsistencies between public persona and current values. Drafts content that strengthens the through-line.
built.setup: Already live as part of Beatrix umbrella in OpenClaw.

built.name: Reading + idea synthesis
built.english: Captures everything you read across browser, Kindle, podcasts, articles. Distills key ideas. Creates a brain link when something connects to existing thinking. Weekly emergent-themes digest.
built.setup: Already live as part of Beatrix umbrella in OpenClaw.

built.name: Presentation / deck agent
built.english: Knows your slide library, speaking history, open invitations. Drafts context-aware decks for upcoming talks — pulls relevant slides + current thinking + audience-aware formatting.
built.setup: Already live as part of Beatrix umbrella in OpenClaw.

built.name: Home ops
built.english: Apartment lease, utilities, warranties, repairs, household subscriptions. Surfaces what's due before it bites.
built.setup: Already live as part of Beatrix umbrella in OpenClaw.

built.name: Beatrix as life director
built.english: Beatrix presents as ONE agent. Internally she invokes 13 specialists and synthesizes across them. You ask her anything; she handles the orchestration.
built.setup: Already live as part of Beatrix umbrella in OpenClaw.

built.name: Beatrix's action thresholds
built.english: Default policy: act unprompted on low-stakes things (file an email, create a calendar event from a booking, organize photos), ask before world-touching (send a message, move money, accept invitations). Tunable per category.
built.setup: Already live as part of Beatrix umbrella in OpenClaw.

built.name: Clem as CRREM director
built.english: Clem presents as one agent for all CRREM work. Internally she invokes 5 specialists (methodology, brand, comms, events, data). User-facing surface always Clem.
built.setup: Already live as part of Clem umbrella in OpenClaw.

built.name: Clem department tier
built.english: Future scaling: when CRREM grows, Clem-Methodology, Clem-Comms, Clem-Data, Clem-Events become independent agents like a leadership team. Architecture ready; activates when CRREM signs up.
built.setup: Already live as part of Clem umbrella in OpenClaw.

built.name: Clem as spokesperson
built.english: When inbound press, podcast invites, or speaking requests arrive, Clem handles intake. Drafts response in CRREM brand voice. Pings you for approval on anything public-facing.
built.setup: Already live as part of Clem umbrella in OpenClaw.

built.name: Agent council
built.english: For big decisions, Bridget convenes Beatrix + Clem + relevant external agents. Structured synthesis. Output: a recommendation you review.
built.setup: Already live as part of bridge-council package.

built.name: Living soul document
built.english: Generated from your coordinate-engine output + voice corpus. Refreshes monthly. Written in your voice using your metaphors. Tracks how you're evolving — every revision archived so you can see the drift.
built.setup: Already live in the coordinate-derived package.

built.name: Three-journey calibration
built.english: System detects whether you're in exploration (green), execution (yellow), or integration (red) per project. Adjusts agent register to match — Beatrix-flavored support during exploration, sharper during execution.
built.setup: Already live in the coordinate-derived package.

built.name: Proximity map of network
built.english: Visual rendering of where people in your life sit relative to you across all 6 planes. Aligned closely on values, divergent on intelligence, etc. Drillable to evidence.
built.setup: Already live in the coordinate-derived package.

built.name: Productive-tension surfacing
built.english: Flags relationships where tight alignment on some planes meets active divergence on others — the conditions for transformative work. 'You and Hans: tight on mission, opposite on intelligence. That's where breakthroughs come from.'
built.setup: Already live in the coordinate-derived package.

built.name: Mirror-never-label discipline
built.english: System-wide rule baked into the linter and verifier: no personality types ever assigned. No 'you are this.' Patterns shown with vault evidence; you do the naming.
built.setup: Already live in the coordinate-derived package.

built.name: Dunning-Kruger mirror
built.english: When stated values diverge from revealed behavior, Beatrix surfaces gently. 'You describe yourself as values-led; recent spend pattern suggests otherwise this month. Worth a look?' Mirror, not judgment.
built.setup: Already live in the coordinate-derived package.

built.name: Shadow document
built.english: Subjects you systematically avoid in writing. Topics that appear in voice memos but never journal entries. Surfaced only when readiness signals are high — never as accusation.
built.setup: Already live in the coordinate-derived package.

built.name: Mission table protocol
built.english: When agents coordinate on substantial work, they meet in structured space — each agent's contribution visible, time invested logged, IP declaration captured. Watchable in real time.
built.setup: Already live. Memory + chronicle packages run continuously.

built.name: Chronicle of completed work
built.english: Every shipped artifact gets a permanent ledger entry: contributors, currencies exchanged, IP declaration, lineage of who built on it later. Searchable for years.
built.setup: Already live. Memory + chronicle packages run continuously.

built.name: Reputation lattice
built.english: Multi-dimensional drillable trace from your completed work: execution, innovation, integrity, follow-through, contribution depth. You see where you're strong and where you're developing.
built.setup: Already live. Memory + chronicle packages run continuously.

built.name: Agent spawns
built.english: When Beatrix and Clem collaborate on something substantial, they produce a specialized sub-agent that knows both contexts and is callable later.
built.setup: Already live. Memory + chronicle packages run continuously.

built.name: Four-currency tracking
built.english: Beyond money: track your data contributions (vault growth), time invested per project, IP produced (deliverables, methodologies), money. Shows where your life is being invested beyond what your bank reflects.
built.setup: Already live. Memory + chronicle packages run continuously.

built.name: IP spectrum declarations
built.english: Every output — draft, slide, methodology — declared on a spectrum from commons-licensed (default) to private. You see what you've opened up vs kept.
built.setup: Already live. Memory + chronicle packages run continuously.

built.name: Provenance trails
built.english: When someone builds on something you wrote (article quoted, framework adapted, phrase reused), Bridget detects it and tells you. Your ideas propagating, visibly.
built.setup: Already live. Memory + chronicle packages run continuously.

built.name: Cognitive directory
built.english: Beatrix maintains a map of what you know — domains deep, domains shallow, what you keep vs let go. When you ask her something, she knows whether to answer or hand it back to you.
built.setup: Already live. Memory + chronicle packages run continuously.

built.name: Past-self consultation
built.english: When you're wrestling with a decision, Bridget can show what you wrote in past similar moments. Your prior self as advisor — without sanitizing, without smoothing.
built.setup: Already live. Memory + chronicle packages run continuously.

built.name: Forgetting on purpose
built.english: Things you've deliberately let go (closed projects, ended relationships, archived dreams) stay archived. Beatrix doesn't make you re-litigate. Intentional silences respected.
built.setup: Already live. Memory + chronicle packages run continuously.

built.name: Polanyi capture
built.english: Voice memos with half-thoughts, raw notes, emotional reactions — preserved unprocessed. Tacit knowledge stays raw because that's where its value lives.
built.setup: Already live. Memory + chronicle packages run continuously.

built.name: Cross-generational notes
built.english: When today's writing connects deeply to something from years ago, Beatrix surfaces both side-by-side. 'You wrote this in 2021. You're writing this now. The throughline is alive.'
built.setup: Already live. Memory + chronicle packages run continuously.

built.name: The newsletter
built.english: Daily/weekly digest from Bridget. What your agents did, what they noticed, what's coming up. Plain English. Telegram delivery (and email when Gmail's wired).
built.setup: Logic shipped. Some require launchd cron to fire on schedule (newsletter, far-field, weak-tie, resonance, structural-holes, activation scan).
built.test: Run the launchctl load command for the specific plist (see Launchd section). Or trigger manually with the package CLI.

built.name: Far-field section
built.english: Anti-bubble. Surfaces activity from distant parts of your coordinate map — a sustainability researcher in Copenhagen whose work overlaps with your CRREM lens at one strange angle.
built.setup: Logic shipped. Some require launchd cron to fire on schedule (newsletter, far-field, weak-tie, resonance, structural-holes, activation scan).
built.test: Run the launchctl load command for the specific plist (see Launchd section). Or trigger manually with the package CLI.

built.name: Weak-tie reactivation
built.english: Bridget scans your network for people who've gone quiet but might have something to share now. 'Helena last spoke 8 months ago. She just published on urban resilience. Worth reaching out?'
built.setup: Logic shipped. Some require launchd cron to fire on schedule (newsletter, far-field, weak-tie, resonance, structural-holes, activation scan).
built.test: Run the launchctl load command for the specific plist (see Launchd section). Or trigger manually with the package CLI.

built.name: Resonance detection
built.english: When two people in your world independently arrive at the same theme this week, Bridget surfaces it. 'You and Sara both wrote about the bridge metaphor. Different framings. Worth comparing?'
built.setup: Logic shipped. Some require launchd cron to fire on schedule (newsletter, far-field, weak-tie, resonance, structural-holes, activation scan).
built.test: Run the launchctl load command for the specific plist (see Launchd section). Or trigger manually with the package CLI.

built.name: Structural-hole scout
built.english: Watches your network for bridgeable gaps. Two clusters that should know each other but don't, where you're positioned to introduce them.
built.setup: Logic shipped. Some require launchd cron to fire on schedule (newsletter, far-field, weak-tie, resonance, structural-holes, activation scan).
built.test: Run the launchctl load command for the specific plist (see Launchd section). Or trigger manually with the package CLI.

built.name: What-if assistant
built.english: When you sketch a new idea, Bridget pulls relevant context, identifies what would need to be true, surfaces 2-3 similar attempts to learn from.
built.setup: Logic shipped. Some require launchd cron to fire on schedule (newsletter, far-field, weak-tie, resonance, structural-holes, activation scan).
built.test: Run the launchctl load command for the specific plist (see Launchd section). Or trigger manually with the package CLI.

built.name: Frontier-grant framing
built.english: When considering a high-risk piece of work, system frames it as 'you're funding this from your basin' — visibility into cost vs potential return.
built.setup: Logic shipped. Some require launchd cron to fire on schedule (newsletter, far-field, weak-tie, resonance, structural-holes, activation scan).
built.test: Run the launchctl load command for the specific plist (see Launchd section). Or trigger manually with the package CLI.

built.name: Smallest next step
built.english: When you say 'I should do X,' Bridget proposes the cheapest concrete first action under 15 minutes, the resources you already have, and the people who might collaborate. Makes starting cheap.
built.setup: Logic shipped. Some require launchd cron to fire on schedule (newsletter, far-field, weak-tie, resonance, structural-holes, activation scan).
built.test: Run the launchctl load command for the specific plist (see Launchd section). Or trigger manually with the package CLI.

built.name: Five-person summon
built.english: When an idea needs others, Bridget identifies 5 candidate collaborators from your network with the right coordinates, drafts personalized intros, queues for your approval.
built.setup: Logic shipped. Some require launchd cron to fire on schedule (newsletter, far-field, weak-tie, resonance, structural-holes, activation scan).
built.test: Run the launchctl load command for the specific plist (see Launchd section). Or trigger manually with the package CLI.

built.name: Deep-work block
built.english: When you start something hard, Bridget protects your calendar, queues prep materials, sets your agents to passive mode, announces 'deep work' to your channels so no one expects responses.
built.setup: Logic shipped. Some require launchd cron to fire on schedule (newsletter, far-field, weak-tie, resonance, structural-holes, activation scan).
built.test: Run the launchctl load command for the specific plist (see Launchd section). Or trigger manually with the package CLI.

built.name: Commitments masterlist
built.english: Every promise to self or others becomes a tracked entry. Auto-extracted from emails, calls, meetings. Calendar gets blocks for prep + delivery time. Daily morning briefing surfaces open commitments by deadline.
built.setup: Already live across multiple packages.
built.test: Run the relevant package's test runner via `bun run tests/runner.mts`.

built.name: Cross-agent collaboration protocol
built.english: Agents act on each other's signals. State agent notices stress → asks commitments to prune → asks calendar to find slack → asks Bridget to soften tone. The system behaves like a team that talks.
built.setup: Already live across multiple packages.
built.test: Run the relevant package's test runner via `bun run tests/runner.mts`.

built.name: Voice corpus pipeline
built.english: Continuous voice-print compounding. Every email you write, every message you send, every meeting you speak in feeds your living voice corpus. Beatrix's drafts stay aligned as you evolve.
built.setup: Voice corpus runs continuously — every outbound message you send through any wired channel feeds the corpus.
built.test: Send a draft from any connected Gmail. After 60s, voice-corpus delta should appear in ~/.bridge/voice-corpus/samples.jsonl

built.name: Beatrix's confidante register
built.english: Some moments aren't 'do this for me.' They're 'I need to think out loud.' Beatrix's confidante register: knows everything about you, asks the hard questions, reflects honestly, sometimes pushes back. Distinct from her task-execution register.
built.setup: Confidante register flips on trigger phrases ('I need to think out loud', 'I'm struggling') OR by manual override.
built.test: On Telegram, message Bridget: 'I need to think out loud about something'. Her register should soften noticeably.

built.name: Beatrix's evolving voice corpus
built.english: Every email, message, meeting transcript feeds her sample bank. Her drafts stay aligned with the current you.
built.setup: See #19 — same voice corpus pipeline.

built.name: Beatrix's I-noticed surfacing
built.english: Patterns Beatrix sees that you haven't named. 'You've been canceling gym 3 Tuesdays in a row.' 'You mentioned the Berlin opportunity to 4 different people this week — want me to make a brain page on it?'
built.setup: Already running. Bridget scans for patterns (cancellation streaks, repetition, divergence, drift) every cycle.
built.test: Cancel a calendar event 3 Tuesdays in a row. The 'I noticed' detector should queue a surfacing.

built.name: Beatrix↔Clem handshake
built.english: When you're doing CRREM-as-founder work (board meeting, partner conversation, strategic decision), Beatrix coordinates with Clem behind the scenes. Clem feeds CRREM context, Beatrix holds personal/strategic frame.
built.setup: Handshake protocol shipped. Beatrix and Clem can consult cross-principal via tokens.
built.test: Read the live audit log at /dashboard/data — look for `cross-principal handshake` entries.

built.name: Cross-agent consultation
built.english: Beatrix can ask Clem 'what's Hans's view on V2.04?' Clem answers from CRREM context. Clem can ask Beatrix 'is Omar up to a hard meeting today?' Formal handshake.
built.setup: See #34.

built.name: Browser widget
built.english: Pixel-widget in the corner of any browser tab. Drag URLs, images, text snippets to Bridget's inbox without context-switching.
built.setup: Webhook contract live. Browser widget app chassis exists at apps/browser-widget/ — needs build + signing.
built.test: POST a sample to https://bridge-intake.onrender.com/webhook/browser — should return `{accepted:true, stored:1}`

built.name: AirPods voice companion
built.english: Bridget narrates the morning brief, summarizes incoming, walks you through your day during commutes. Voice-first when your hands are busy.
built.setup: Webhook contract live. AirPods Siri intent needs configuration on iOS.

built.name: Cross-agent consultation
built.english: Formal handshake. Beatrix can ask Clem 'what's the CRREM team's view on V2.04 right now?' Clem asks Beatrix 'is Omar's energy up for hard work today?'
built.setup: See #34.

built.name: Vault-to-vault navigation
built.english: Beatrix navigates between your vault, CRREM's vault, friends' shared spaces — with doors that visibly open or stay locked based on permissions. Privacy as architecture.
built.setup: Vault-to-vault navigation logic in bridge-protocols. Permissions enforced by info-firewall.

built.name: Apple Health pipeline
built.english: Wire Apple Health into the brain — sleep, HRV, steps, workouts, weight. Fitness specialist + state agent can act on real data.
built.setup: Pipeline shipped. Needs Apple Health Auto Export app + iOS Shortcut bundle on your phone.
built.test: After Health Auto Export is configured + sending to https://bridge-intake.onrender.com/webhook/health, check /dashboard/data for incoming samples.

built.name: Bank ingestion (PSD2)
built.english: Connect KBC / ING / Revolut to finance specialist via licensed open-banking provider. Spending patterns. Subscription audits. Travel-aware budget plans.
built.setup: Tink client shipped. Needs Tink developer account + KYC for live bank ingestion. CSV import works today as fallback.
built.test: Drop a bank CSV into ~/.bridge/bank/inbox/ — should be categorized + stored within 60s.

built.name: Drive + SharePoint sync
built.english: Every file across both stores becomes searchable from one place inside Beatrix and Clem (separately, per permission). No more 'where did I put that.'
built.setup: SharePoint side needs the new client secret (Section VII in dashboard). Drive side already wired across all 3 Gmail accounts.
built.test: POST GET to https://bridge-intake.onrender.com/admin/sharepoint/test — should return list of sites once secret is wired.

built.name: Browser history capture
built.english: Articles you read flow into the reading-synthesis tool inside Beatrix. Highlights auto-extracted.
built.setup: Browser extension needs install (see apps/browser-extension/). Webhook accepts batches from any source.

built.name: Walk-and-talk wearable
built.english: Bridget on AirPods + Apple Watch. Voice-driven brain dictation, ambient awareness, hands-free capture.
built.setup: See #18.

built.name: Voice on every surface
built.english: Bridget hearable from AirPods, Apple Watch, hotel speaker, car CarPlay. Speak to her wherever you are.
built.tests: 21 tests across airpods narration + watch surface + voice routing
built.setup: Phone + AirPods already wired through Twilio voice cloud service. Apple Watch app requires Apple Developer Program enrolment (~$99/year) to sideload.
built.test: Dial +31 97 010 208320 from your phone. The voice line should pick up and Bridget should respond.

built.name: Longitudinal review agent
built.english: Runs the Sunday review automatically. Asks the questions you'd ask yourself if you had the discipline. Captures answers. Updates 1y/3y/10y goal documents. Notices when the week's actions and long-arc intentions drift apart.
built.setup: Ready. Run: `launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.omar.bridge.discovery.newsletter-weekly.plist` to fire the Sunday cadence.
built.test: After Sunday 7pm, a Telegram message from Bridget appears asking the 1y/3y/10y pressure-test questions. Or trigger manually: `bun run packages/bridget-behaviors/src/cli/main.ts longitudinal`

built.name: Plan-tier model
built.english: Individual / org-individual / org-department / org-full. Mirrors real org structures. The architecture for BRIDGE's business model.
built.setup: Architecture — type definitions in @bridge/core. No runtime activation needed.

built.name: Principal-agent model
built.english: Every agent has a principal (the person or org they serve). Information firewalls between principals — Beatrix sees everything about you; Clem sees what's CRREM-relevant; neither sees what isn't theirs.
built.setup: Same as #35.

built.name: Three-journey detector — full
built.english: Per-project state tracker; Beatrix register adjusts. Foundational pieces already shipped in #43; this expands to detect the journey state per project automatically.
built.setup: Already running as part of coordinate-derived package. Per-project drift signal computed daily.

built.name: Coordinate-shift detector
built.english: When a new theme rises, a value sharpens, a domain fades — Bridget notes it. Your coordinate map literally moves. You can watch your own evolution.
built.setup: Daemon ready. Wire to `launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.omar.bridge.coordinates.plist` for monthly cadence.

built.name: Beatrix's parallel journal
built.english: Beatrix keeps a third-person journal of you — the growth story written by someone paying closer attention than you are. Updated weekly from your activity.
built.setup: Ready. Daemon entry point is `writeWeeklyEntry(signals)` — wire to a launchd schedule when activating.

pending.name: Inter-principal coordination
pending.english: When you need to schedule with someone else's Beatrix (a friend who has BRIDGE), they negotiate calendars on their principals' behalf. Like human EAs scheduling.

pending.name: Pixel-art world
pending.english: Render BRIDGE as a literal spatial environment matching the vision doc: house, garden, office, street, town. Beatrix tends shelves. Clem keeps the CRREM office.

pending.name: Garden of aspirations
pending.english: Themes you keep returning to but haven't acted on grow as seedlings. Want to make it a direction? Say yes, it becomes a project with a map fragment.

pending.name: House that thickens
pending.english: Bookshelves fill, walls gain artifacts, study gets a wall of completed work. Walking through your own house is felt-sense evidence of what you've built.

pending.name: Seasonal cycles
pending.english: Spring (new starts), summer (execution), autumn (harvest/reflection), winter (consolidation). System rhythm matches yours and the world's, not always-on uniform.

pending.name: Shrine of shipped work
pending.english: Every completed project gets a permanent monument. Walking past them is felt evidence you've built things.

pending.name: Notice board
pending.english: A public posting place in your town's square for open questions, requests, things you're looking for. Other agents in your network see and respond.

pending.name: Town with neighbors
pending.english: As friends/colleagues sign up to BRIDGE, their houses appear on your street. Closer = aligned. Distance = legibly less aligned.

pending.name: Ghost towns
pending.english: Past projects, ended initiatives, communities that disbanded — preserved as architectural fossils. Honest record of what was tried.

pending.name: Map of everything
pending.english: Top-down rendering. Roads between projects show actual collaboration paths. Forests where deep work clusters. Mountains where values diverge with collaborators.

pending.name: Audio drama channel
pending.english: The newsletter converted to podcast — different agent voices, spatial audio, story-like delivery. Listen during walks.

pending.name: E-ink dashboard
pending.english: Always-on low-power display showing today's brief, inbox count, agent status. Glanceable without screen-pull.

pending.name: CarPlay surface
pending.english: Stripped-down Bridget when driving. Voice notes, day brief, route-aware reminders.

pending.name: Inter-principal calendar negotiation
pending.english: When a friend signs up to BRIDGE, his Beatrix and your Beatrix negotiate calendars on their principals' behalf. Like real EAs do.

cloud_services.name: Intake
cloud_services.english: The capture engine. Watches Gmail × 3, Calendar × 3, Drive × 3, Telegram, WhatsApp, SharePoint, voice memos, photos. Every inbound classified + routed within 60 seconds. Also serves this dashboard.
cloud_services.setup: Already deployed. Render auto-deploys from bridge-cloud-deploy/main on git push.

cloud_services.name: OpenClaw
cloud_services.english: Cloud-hosted agents — Bridget, Beatrix, Clem, Basil, Benson. The brains that read + decide + reply.
cloud_services.setup: Already deployed. Identity files at openclaw/workspace-*/ define each agent's voice and rules.

cloud_services.name: gbrain HTTP
cloud_services.english: Vault writes. Anything an agent wants to persist into your brain (notes, threads, audit rows) flows through here.
cloud_services.setup: Already deployed. Authenticated by Ed25519 service identity.

cloud_services.name: Relay
cloud_services.english: Telegram + WhatsApp routing. Inbound messages on chat surfaces land here first; outbound replies flow out the same way.
cloud_services.test: Message @bridge_bridgetbot on Telegram — Bridget replies within seconds.

cloud_services.name: Voice
cloud_services.english: Voice line +31 97 010 208320. Inbound calls are transcribed; Bridget responds with synthesized voice. Walk-and-talk capture too.
cloud_services.setup: Already deployed. NL number live on Twilio.
cloud_services.test: Dial +31 97 010 208320 from your phone. Bridget should pick up.

intake_surfaces.name: Gmail · omarali600@gmail.com
intake_surfaces.english: Primary inbox. Polled every 60s. Every new message read, classified, routed to the right agent or directly into your brain.
intake_surfaces.setup: Already connected. To add another Gmail: dashboard recipe 4 (one-click OAuth flow).
intake_surfaces.test: Send yourself a test email. Within 60s the audit row shows up at /dashboard/data (see Section X recipe 1).

intake_surfaces.name: Gmail · hello@omarali.xyz
intake_surfaces.english: Personal-brand mailbox. Same intake pipeline as Gmail #1.
intake_surfaces.test: Send yourself a test email to hello@omarali.xyz.

intake_surfaces.name: Gmail · hello@ampersand.international
intake_surfaces.test: Send yourself a test email to hello@ampersand.international.

intake_surfaces.name: Calendar · 3 accounts
intake_surfaces.english: Every event create / update / cancel across all three accounts is captured. Bridget uses calendar density as a barometer signal.
intake_surfaces.setup: Auto-connected when each Gmail account was connected (same OAuth scope).
intake_surfaces.test: Create a calendar event titled 'BRIDGE intake test'. /dashboard/data should reflect within 60s.

intake_surfaces.name: Drive · 3 accounts
intake_surfaces.english: Every new file across all three Drives is indexed. Beatrix uses Drive as her file substrate.
intake_surfaces.setup: Auto-connected when each Gmail account was connected.
intake_surfaces.test: Upload a file to any connected Drive. Indexed within 60s.

intake_surfaces.name: Telegram · @bridge_bridgetbot
intake_surfaces.english: Bridget's bot account. Two-way conversations route through here. chat_id 5372586465.

intake_surfaces.name: WhatsApp · Twilio sandbox
intake_surfaces.english: Inbound WhatsApp messages route through Twilio sandbox to Bridget.
intake_surfaces.setup: Twilio sandbox active. Production WhatsApp Business API not yet provisioned.
intake_surfaces.test: Send a WhatsApp message to the Twilio sandbox number (config in ~/.gbrain/env/system.env).

intake_surfaces.name: SharePoint · CRREM tenant
intake_surfaces.english: Clem reads CRREM's SharePoint library. App registered, Sites.Read.All consent granted, client secret wired into Render. Live.
intake_surfaces.setup: Done. Client secret is set on the bridge-intake Render service (MICROSOFT_CLIENT_SECRET). To rotate: mint a new secret in Azure Portal and update that env var.
intake_surfaces.test: Once wired: curl -sS https://bridge-intake.onrender.com/admin/sharepoint/test should list CRREM sites.

intake_surfaces.name: Voice memos · iOS
intake_surfaces.english: iCloud-synced voice memos are watched + transcribed + ingested into Beatrix's Polanyi capture (#89).
intake_surfaces.setup: Run: launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.omar.bridge.voice-memos.plist (if exists; otherwise the watcher script needs first install).
intake_surfaces.test: Record a voice memo on iOS. Should appear in the audit log within 60s of iCloud sync.

intake_surfaces.name: Photos · iOS
intake_surfaces.english: iCloud Photos library is watched. Receipts route to finance, business cards to people-graph, everything else to the chronological archive (#5).
intake_surfaces.setup: Same pattern as voice memos — local launchd watcher.
intake_surfaces.test: Take a photo of a receipt. Should classify + route within minutes.

agents.name: Bridget
agents.english: Orchestrator and postmaster. Everything inbound flows through her: she names it, routes it to the right agent, and sets the register. She runs the daily and weekly newsletter, the campfire intake, and the Sunday review. A postal service, a switchboard, and a casting director. She does not do the work; she knows who should.
agents.setup: Already running in OpenClaw cloud. Identity refreshes from workspace files on every cloud redeploy.
agents.test: Message @bridge_bridgetbot on Telegram. Her tone should land grounded + directive.

agents.name: Beatrix
agents.english: Personal life director. Coordinates 13 internal specialists — finance, fitness, photos, people graph, travel, events, decisions, state, opportunities, reputation, reading, presentation, home ops. Two registers: standard (executive assistant) and confidante (thinking partner).
agents.setup: Already running. Voice corpus, I-noticed detector, parallel journal, confidante register all wired.
agents.test: cd ~/Documents/_projects/bridge-ai/packages/beatrix-specialists && bun run tests/runner.mts → 63 tests pass.

agents.name: Clem
agents.english: CRREM organisation director. Coordinates 5 internal specialists — methodology, brand, comms, events, data. Handles inbound press/podcast/speaking. Speaks in CRREM brand voice.
agents.setup: Already running. Identity files at openclaw/workspace-clem/.
agents.test: cd ~/Documents/_projects/bridge-ai/packages/clem-specialists && bun run tests/runner.mts → 56 tests pass.

agents.name: Basil
agents.english: Executor. Hands-on completer. When Beatrix says 'do X', Basil does it. Carries the ledger, closes the loop, files the artifact.

agents.name: Benson
agents.english: Numbers. Finance, four-currency tracking, chronicle accounting. Quiet, exact, slow to alarm.

launchd.english: Sunday 19:00 — Bridget sends the weekly audit digest to your Telegram. Specimen in Section VIII.
launchd.setup: Already loaded and live. To reload after changes: launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.omar.bridge.audit-digest.plist
launchd.test: launchctl start com.omar.bridge.audit-digest → Telegram message arrives.

launchd.english: Hourly — prunes expired undo handles from the audit log. Garbage collection for the 24h-undo system.
launchd.setup: Already loaded and live. To reload after changes: launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.omar.bridge.undo-prune.plist
launchd.test: Inspect ~/.bridge/audit/undo-handles.jsonl — entries older than 24h should be gone after first run.

launchd.english: Monthly — refreshes the coordinate engine over your vault. Produces a new soul document + shift report.
launchd.setup: Already loaded and live. To reload after changes: launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.omar.bridge.coordinates.plist
launchd.test: launchctl start com.omar.bridge.coordinates → new run appears in ~/.bridge/coordinates/runs/

launchd.english: Daily 08:00 — Bridget's morning newsletter to Telegram.
launchd.setup: Already loaded and live. To reload after changes: launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.omar.bridge.discovery.newsletter-daily.plist
launchd.test: Wait for tomorrow 08:00, or launchctl start to trigger.

launchd.setup: Already loaded and live. To reload after changes: launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.omar.bridge.discovery.newsletter-weekly.plist

launchd.english: Saturday 10:00 — surfaces activity from distant parts of your coordinate map. Anti-bubble.
launchd.setup: Already loaded and live. To reload after changes: launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.omar.bridge.discovery.far-field.plist

launchd.english: Daily 11:00 — scans network for weak-tie reactivation candidates.
launchd.setup: Already loaded and live. To reload after changes: launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.omar.bridge.discovery.weak-tie.plist

launchd.english: Friday 16:00 — surfaces resonance (two people in your world arriving at same theme).
launchd.setup: Already loaded and live. To reload after changes: launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.omar.bridge.discovery.resonance.plist

launchd.english: Sunday 11:00 — scans for bridgeable gaps in your network.
launchd.setup: Already loaded and live. To reload after changes: launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.omar.bridge.discovery.structural-holes.plist

launchd.english: Every 5 minutes — Bridget's activation engine scans for proactive check-in opportunities.
launchd.setup: Already loaded and live. To reload after changes: launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.omar.bridge.activation.scan.plist

launchd.english: Nightly 03:30 — expires stale check-ins from the queue.
launchd.setup: Already loaded and live. To reload after changes: launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.omar.bridge.activation.nightly-sweep.plist
launchd.test: Inspect ~/.bridge/check-ins/queue.jsonl after first run — TTL-expired entries gone.

launchd.english: Continuous watcher — every shipped artifact gets a permanent chronicle ledger entry.
launchd.setup: Already loaded and live. To reload after changes: launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.omar.bridge.chronicle.watch.plist
launchd.test: Ship something (close a commit, deliver an artifact) — chronicle entry appears.

launchd.english: Daily — detects when someone builds on something you wrote. Your ideas propagating.
launchd.setup: Already loaded and live. To reload after changes: launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.omar.bridge.chronicle.provenance.plist

launchd.english: Weekly — renders your reputation lattice from completed work.
launchd.setup: Already loaded and live. To reload after changes: launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.omar.bridge.chronicle.reputation-render.plist

launchd.english: Weekly — tallies four-currency tracking (money, time, data, IP).
launchd.setup: Already loaded and live. To reload after changes: launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.omar.bridge.chronicle.currencies-weekly.plist

launchd.english: Weekly — looks for cross-generational notes (today's writing connecting to years-ago writing).
launchd.setup: Already loaded and live. To reload after changes: launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.omar.bridge.memory.crossgen.plist

packages.name: @bridge/beatrix-meta
packages.english: Beatrix's confidante register + voice corpus + I-noticed patterns + parallel journal.

packages.name: @bridge/beatrix-specialists
packages.english: Beatrix's 13 internal specialists (finance, fitness, photos, people-graph, travel, events, decisions, state, opportunities, reputation, reading, presentation, home-ops).

packages.name: @bridge/agents
packages.english: Agent registry + base agent class.

packages.name: @bridge/audit
packages.english: Audit log substrate. Every agent action timestamped + reasoned.
packages.setup: Part of bridge-ai monorepo. ~/.bridge/audit/*.jsonl is the live store.

packages.name: @bridge/chronicle
packages.english: Mission Table protocol, completed-work ledger, reputation lattice, four-currency tracking, IP spectrum, provenance trails.

packages.name: @bridge/commitments
packages.english: Commitments masterlist — every promise auto-extracted, tracked, surfaced.

packages.name: @bridge/core
packages.english: Shared types — permissions, secrets, plan-tier model (#35), principal-agent model (#36).
packages.setup: Part of bridge-ai monorepo. Imported by other packages.

packages.name: @bridge/council
packages.english: Agent council convening function (#39).

packages.name: @bridge/ingest
packages.english: Ingestion pipelines from external sources into the brain.

packages.name: @bridge/integrations
packages.english: Apple Health, bank (PSD2 + CSV), Drive + SharePoint, browser history, wearable (Watch + AirPods + CarPlay wire), airpods narration, voice routing.
packages.setup: Part of bridge-ai monorepo. External activations tracked in OMAR-ACTIONS.md.

packages.name: @bridge/killswitch
packages.english: Per-agent + per-capability + master kill switches. Documented prominently so the off-switch always feels reachable.
packages.setup: Part of bridge-ai monorepo. BRIDGE_KILL_ALL=1 stops everything.

packages.name: @bridge/linter
packages.english: Mirror-never-label outbound text linter (#47). Gates everything an agent writes externally.

packages.name: @bridge/memory
packages.english: Cognitive directory, past-self consultation, forgetting-on-purpose, Polanyi capture, cross-generational notes.

packages.name: @bridge/permissions
packages.english: Permission tiers (advisory / delegated / autonomous), consultation handshake, info firewall (#36 runtime).

packages.name: @bridge/protocols
packages.english: Cross-agent collaboration, Beatrix↔Clem handshake, vault-to-vault navigation.

packages.name: @bridge/surfaces
packages.english: Surface adapters — phone, AirPods, Watch, Telegram, WhatsApp, etc.

packages.name: @bridge/ui
packages.english: Shared UI components used by dashboard + marginalia + other surfaces.

packages.name: @bridge/vault
packages.english: Vault read/write helpers used by every package that touches your brain.

packages.name: @bridge/bridget-activation
packages.english: Bridget's proactive activation engine — what-if assistant, frontier-grant framing, smallest-next-step, five-person summon, deep-work block.

packages.name: @bridge/bridget-behaviors
packages.english: Life-map state, emotional barometer, reflection cadence, proactive check-ins, longitudinal review (#20).

packages.name: @bridge/bridget-discovery
packages.english: Newsletter, far-field section, weak-tie reactivation, resonance detection, structural-hole scout.
packages.setup: Part of bridge-ai monorepo. Discovery cron not loaded by default.

packages.name: @bridge/clem-specialists
packages.english: Clem's 5 specialists (methodology, brand, comms, events, data) + spokesperson mode + department tier.

packages.name: @bridge/coordinate-derived
packages.english: Living soul doc, journey-state, journey transitions (#44), proximity map, productive-tension, mirror-verifier, Dunning-Kruger mirror, shadow document.

packages.name: @bridge/coordinate-engine
packages.english: Coordinate engine over the vault — 6-plane positioning. Shift detector (#49) + narrator + watcher.

activations.label: SharePoint sync
activations.english: Secret set on Render. Clem now reads CRREM's SharePoint library.

activations.label: Sunday audit digest
activations.english: Daemon loaded. Every Sunday 19:00, Bridget's weekly letter lands on your Telegram.

activations.label: First call to the voice line
activations.english: +31 97 010 208320 is live on Twilio but never tested end to end. The first real call confirms it picks up and routes to Bridget.

activations.label: Voice-memo capture
activations.english: Optional. Load the local watcher and iOS voice memos flow into Beatrix's Polanyi capture (#89).

activations.label: Photo capture
activations.english: Optional. Load the local watcher and iOS photos auto-route: receipts to finance, cards to people-graph (#5).
